startupForm.title: Configure Data Generator
startupForm.description: Please configure the data generator settings before starting.

inputs.name: initialDelay
inputs.label: Initial Delay (seconds)
inputs.description: The delay between generated events at startup

inputs.name: mode
inputs.label: Generation Mode
inputs.description: Select how data should be generated

commands.name: slow
commands.description: Set generation rate to slow (1 event per second)

commands.name: fast
commands.description: Set generation rate to fast (100 events per second)

commands.name: specify
commands.description: Set a custom delay between generated events
